MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Jan-03-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Michael S. Rossoff, Esq. 863-7100 for pltf & opposing party; no appearance by deft.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows: Deny motion to quash, process server declaration establishes proper service.
The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Order signed in open court.
